kept.text:
Good morning CT
MovitOn_P2P kept showing up lately

This time it felt too clear to ignore

Uber changed how we use cars
Airbnb changed how we use spaces
Now the movement itself is being redesigned

@MovitOn_P2P is building a system where the people already moving become part of the logistics layer

That’s the interesting part

movement is constant
value gets created from coordination

and usually
The people who move first
understand the opportunity first
This doesn’t feel like something just to watch anymore

it feels like something to position around early

kept.text:
$500. That's what Airbnb consultants charge to audit your listing.

Title. Photos. Pricing. Competitor gaps. The whole thing.

A guy who's done this hundreds of times just watched Claude do it in 30 seconds and said - on camera, to his audience - "You no longer have to go to a guru or an expert."

He built his career on being that guru. He built his career on being that expert.

The $500 is now a prompt. The prompt is free. The expert just told you himself.

Bookmark this. Next time someone charges you $500 for advice Claude gives in 30 seconds - you'll know better.

kept.text:
Renters Rights Act Starts TODAY 

Record numbers of landlords selling up or listing their properties on Airbnb or licensed accommodation…. Which will see many evicted.

Councils don’t have the properties to house all those who will now be homeless …. We told you this was a bad idea. 

With a contract, or in any industry, both parties must be seen to have rights, with the law protecting all. When this doesn’t happen the industry falls apart and in this case rents will now increase, landlords will be extremely harsh with how they qualify tenants and housing stock will drop, which will negatively impact tenants the most. 

Well done Labour 👏🏽

A newly surfaced video has added fresh attention to the death of university student Constance Githinji, capturing the moments immediately after she fell from a sixth-floor Airbnb apartment in Kileleshwa.

In the footage, Tony Odhiambo is seen alongside an apartment security guard rushing downstairs in an apparent attempt to locate her. Amid the confusion, Tony is heard shouting “Amejiua” as they descend the stairs.

Watch 👇

kept.text:
The backyard was probably my favorite part of this Airbnb.

Some are just a place to sleep, but this one gave you a reason to slow down a little. We sat out there with coffee in the morning, bourbon in the evening, and that big East Texas sky doing what it does.

Stone patio, fire going, chairs pulled up, trees all around, and just enough quiet to make you forget about the real world for a while.

Hard to beat a place that makes doing nothing feel like the whole point.

kept.text:
🚨 重磅：美国众议院启动对共匪AI渗透调查，多间企业陷入风暴中心！
美国国家安全警报拉响！众议院国土安全委员会与对共特别委员会正式联手，针对共匪对美AI产业的渗透与盗窃展开深入调查。
📍 核心动态：
• 点名调查： 委员会已向 Airbnb 和 AnySphere（爆红AI工具 Cursor 的母公司）发出公函，要求其协助调查共匪如何利用美国创新加速自身AI发展。
• 指控罪名： 匪方企业被指控通过间谍活动、知识产权窃取及“未经授权的模型蒸馏”等手段，剥夺美方系统核心能力，并剥离安全护栏进行“套壳”再造。
• 安全隐患： Airbnb CEO 此前公开称赞阿里巴巴的 Qwen（通义千问） 模型“又快又便宜”，并将其重度用于客户服务，此举引发了议员对美国用户数据外泄及依赖性的高度警觉。
🔥 舆论焦点：
在情报界警告共匪正全方位“收割”美方AI成果之际，参议员桑德斯（Bernie Sanders） 却因呼吁与匪方“合作”而非竞争，被批评者痛批为“拱手让出领先地位”的叛徒行为。
⚠️ 共和党主导议员警告：
这不仅仅是商业竞争，而是一场关乎国家安全的保卫战。美国最顶尖的创新正在被恶意蚕食，而部分美企为了短期利润正成为“特洛伊木马”。
喵评：清除共匪，势在必行‼️‼️

kept.text:
Les Uber, Stripe et Airbnb de la prochaine décennie n'ont pas encore émergé.

Ils vont commencer à apparaître dans les prochains mois. Les LLMs frontière commencent à se cristalliser à un niveau qui rend possible une nouvelle catégorie de software : le software agentique.

Ces boîtes seront difficiles à construire. Elles mettront du temps à bien faire. Mais elles compounderont, et elles créeront la seule défensibilité réelle de cette décennie.

Elles seront toutes construites sur le même paradigme. Un paradigme que personne n'a encore nommé.

J'ai écrit l'essai qui le nomme.

Organism-Oriented Programming. Lisez-le. Comprenez-le. C'est la grammaire des start-up de demain.
